description_long: This is a classic claw hammer featuring a robust, metallic head and a long, straight handle. The head has two distinct parts: a flat, cylindrical striking face for driving nails and a sharply curved claw for prying and removing nails. The handle appears to be made of a dark, possibly composite or metal material, with a subtle taper and a smooth finish. The hammer's head is a lighter metallic color, contrasting with the darker handle. There are no visible markings, logos, or signs of wear, suggesting it is in pristine condition. The overall design is utilitarian and well-suited for construction or repair tasks in urban environments.
description: A pristine claw hammer with a metallic head and a dark, straight handle, featuring a flat striking face and a curved claw for nail removal.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile of the hammer, highlighting the curved claw and flat striking face.
description_view_1: End-on view showing the circular striking face and the narrow width of the handle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again displaying the curved claw and striking face, with the handle's length visible.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the split claw and the alignment of the handle with the head.
attribute_handle_type: Straight composite handle with a smooth, slightly tapered design and a dark finish.
attribute_head_type: Claw hammer head with a flat, cylindrical striking face and a sharply curved claw for nail removal.
